allow: Bash(which flutter && flutter --version 2>/dev/null || echo "Flutter not found")
Bash(which melos 2>/dev/null || dart pub global list 2>/dev/null | grep melos || echo "Melos not found")
Bash(dart pub global activate melos 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(export PATH="$PATH":"$HOME/.pub-cache/bin" && cd /mnt/project && melos bootstrap 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(for f in /mnt/project/packages/*/pubspec.yaml /mnt/project/apps/*/pubspec.yaml; do echo "=== $f ==="; grep -n "resolution" "$f" || echo "NO resolution field"; done)
Bash(find /mnt/project -name "pubspec_overrides.yaml" -delete && find /mnt/project -name ".dart_tool" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo "Cleaned up")
Bash(flutter pub outdated --json 2>/dev/null | head -5 || true; dart pub cache list 2>/dev/null | grep freezed | head -5 || true)
Bash(dart pub cache add freezed 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(which google-chrome || which chromium-browser || which chromium || echo "No Chrome finding"; which flutter && flutter devices 2>&1 | head -10)
